name: Rogue
description: A stealthy skirmisher built around burst damage and utility. Rogues open with a devastating backstab, envenom their blades, sneak past danger and are the only class able to pick locked chests and doors; at level 15 they learn eviscerate, a rupturing finisher that leaves a foe bleeding out, and at level 30 ambush, an opening strike from stealth that hits like a hammer and leaves the victim dazed.
